title: Leveling Guide
subtitle: SAFE PROGRESSION
intro: This guide focuses on leveling without making progression feel messy or overwhelming.
Use it to figure out when to farm, when to upgrade, and when to move forward.

sections.title: How To Think About Leveling
paragraphs: Fast leveling is not just about fighting stronger enemies.
You level better when your damage, healing, survivability, and route knowledge are all stable.

sections.title: Safe Leveling Loop
items: Upgrade once progress starts feeling slow.
Move up only when your runs feel controlled.
Repeat instead of forcing difficult fights.

sections.title: SYSTEM WARNING
sections.text: Grinding in a zone that is too dangerous often wastes more time than it saves.

sections.title: Leveling Priorities
rows: Use a weapon you can land hits with
